---
title: "Bioinformatics for Proteomics"
date: 2026-06-01
description: "The original hands-on CompOmics course on mass spectrometry-based proteomics data analysis: identification, functional analysis, data sharing, and quantification. Slides and exercise resources included. A modernised version is in preparation."
categories: [proteomics, course, identification, quantification, data-sharing, searchgui, peptideshaker]
---

```{=html}
<div class="bfp">

  <p class="bfp-lead">The classic <strong>Bioinformatics for Proteomics</strong> course: a hands-on walk through a full mass spectrometry data-analysis pipeline, from a raw spectrum file to a shared, quantified result. Work through the four modules in order, or jump to the step you need.</p>

  <div class="bfp-note">
    <i class="bi bi-clock-history" aria-hidden="true"></i>
    <div>
      <p><strong>Archived materials.</strong> This page preserves the original course. Some tools, formats, and versions reflect the field as it was when the course was written and are now partly outdated (for example, PRIDE XML has been superseded by mzIdentML and mzTab). A modernised version is in preparation.</p>
      <p class="bfp-note-meta">Shared under a <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/">CC BY-SA 4.0 licence</a>. Please cite <a href="https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/24678044">Vaudel et al. (2014)</a>.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="bfp-general">
    <span class="bfp-general-label">Course-wide</span>
    <div class="bfp-links">
      <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRyV1ZnaVZoaHktWlE/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-nv0BLwLDq5qO-6YOgK49Ag"><i class="bi bi-chat-square-text" aria-hidden="true"></i>Questions &amp; answers</a>
      <a class="bfp-link" href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1BQfRAZ1L4Szn_vsMaICiYyu84sKjXU8xQXFmwXg_oOI/viewform"><i class="bi bi-ui-checks" aria-hidden="true"></i>Feedback form</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Module 1 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <section class="bfp-module">
    <header class="bfp-module-head">
      <span class="bfp-module-num">1</span>
      <div class="bfp-module-heading">
        <span class="bfp-eyebrow">Module</span>
        <h2 class="bfp-module-title">Identification</h2>
        <p class="bfp-module-desc">The full path from a raw file to validated peptides and proteins: format conversion, spectrum processing, database preparation, peptide-spectrum matching, inference, validation, PTM analysis, and de novo sequencing.</p>
      </div>
    </header>
    <ol class="bfp-steps">
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">1.1</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Database generation</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRyUGxQdmw3cGNUSTQ/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-VIMx1s6vmKRwMOBkOlS6Ng"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">1.2</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Peak list generation</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRyYTJBZVZkZFFuSUE/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-lctIbpXK4PN2uxwK7g13HQ"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xhfAreX_PJzKscyLAuMfqYEJNZFkeAfP/view?usp=sharing"><i class="bi bi-download" aria-hidden="true"></i>Exercise data</a>
            <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://proteowizard.sourceforge.net/"><i class="bi bi-wrench-adjustable" aria-hidden="true"></i>ProteoWizard</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">1.3</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Peptide to spectrum matching</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRyaDBXMDVXOWVaUkk/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-4jJ7-2kjLBDci1eBytMO1A"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1q-1Wc865DZK8YQwGAXclTLFy8rBov2NJ/view?usp=sharing"><i class="bi bi-download" aria-hidden="true"></i>Exercise data</a>
            <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://compomics.github.io/projects/searchgui.html"><i class="bi bi-wrench-adjustable" aria-hidden="true"></i>SearchGUI</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">1.4</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Browsing identification results</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRyUm5tdFRObTJSaEE/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-NgNbCuD5h8MAoJy79cJk7w"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cfatBwiQkchnKKsBvAfQ0BvfhgMBHnhA/view?usp=sharing"><i class="bi bi-download" aria-hidden="true"></i>Exercise data</a>
            <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://compomics.github.io/projects/peptide-shaker.html"><i class="bi bi-wrench-adjustable" aria-hidden="true"></i>PeptideShaker</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">1.5</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Peptide and protein validation</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRyUU9ycjFScmlaZjA/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-LLHCRH0CUf9Xzx7BlITSPQ"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
            <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://compomics.github.io/projects/peptide-shaker.html"><i class="bi bi-wrench-adjustable" aria-hidden="true"></i>PeptideShaker</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">1.6</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">PTM analysis</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRybHZXeVBvNXB1Tkk/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-C4_nR2G5vhwRpESsONlFMQ"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1j-6zj_g5jZFT8ywrYYsN8zuS4x4lXMYS/view?usp=sharing"><i class="bi bi-download" aria-hidden="true"></i>Exercise data</a>
            <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://compomics.github.io/projects/peptide-shaker.html"><i class="bi bi-wrench-adjustable" aria-hidden="true"></i>PeptideShaker</a>
            <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="https://genesis.ugent.be/maven2/eu/isas/peptideshaker/PeptideShaker/3.0.11/PeptideShaker-3.0.11.zip"><i class="bi bi-box-seam" aria-hidden="true"></i>Download 3.0.11</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">1.7</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">De novo peptide identification</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRySWhqTGUtS1hVRGs/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-Hplewb7eyWoIgCK5kzKvfw"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1L0Se_afHDL0G8AbAq9KOJQrr-aQX9gUn/view?usp=sharing"><i class="bi bi-download" aria-hidden="true"></i>Exercise data</a>
            <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://compomics.github.io/projects/denovogui.html"><i class="bi bi-wrench-adjustable" aria-hidden="true"></i>DeNovoGUI</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    </ol>
  </section>

  <!-- ── Module 2 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <section class="bfp-module">
    <header class="bfp-module-head">
      <span class="bfp-module-num">2</span>
      <div class="bfp-module-heading">
        <span class="bfp-eyebrow">Module</span>
        <h2 class="bfp-module-title">Functional analysis</h2>
        <p class="bfp-module-desc">Turning an identification list into biology: retrieving protein information, pathway analysis, 3D structure visualisation, and Gene Ontology annotation.</p>
      </div>
    </header>
    <div class="bfp-loose">
      <div class="bfp-links">
        <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRybzZKMHJxR04tVkU/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0--IhNfNOJsvEHBAEhGPzX0A"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
        <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/12V_5RpVdpXODrLxPR2eT89LJvcZF34r5/view?usp=sharing"><i class="bi bi-download" aria-hidden="true"></i>Exercise data</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ── Module 3 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <section class="bfp-module">
    <header class="bfp-module-head">
      <span class="bfp-module-num">3</span>
      <div class="bfp-module-heading">
        <span class="bfp-eyebrow">Module</span>
        <h2 class="bfp-module-title">Data sharing</h2>
        <p class="bfp-module-desc">Submitting and reusing data through community repositories: converting results to standard formats, submitting to PRIDE and ProteomeXchange, browsing published datasets, and reprocessing.</p>
      </div>
    </header>
    <div class="bfp-note bfp-note--inline">
      <i class="bi bi-exclamation-circle" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <div>
        <p>These course notes use <strong>PRIDE XML</strong>, now deprecated. Current submissions use <a href="https://www.psidev.info/mzidentml">mzIdentML</a> and <a href="https://www.psidev.info/mztab">mzTab</a>; the submission workflow through PRIDE and ProteomeXchange is otherwise unchanged.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <ol class="bfp-steps">
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">3.0</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Introduction</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRyb3BHYWtud2tCTkE/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-LKTuwWEKerk6fh62BXTonA"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">3.1</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Submit</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRyeW80cHptYnhxSmc/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-twqVpJPMU2_Z19tHpf9QGQ"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1AxIcN_uP7UONJFYrserKxma6tOPO-kk5/view?usp=sharing"><i class="bi bi-download" aria-hidden="true"></i>Exercise data</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">3.2</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Browse</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRydkxfTEJJSDNDeG8/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-fnyQy8iK8H4BC5JOwP-JJw"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ncT57QBr6Z4vMSRHFsgPLAA1S04S4f1L/view?usp=sharing"><i class="bi bi-download" aria-hidden="true"></i>Exercise data</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">3.3</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Reprocess</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRydjFLSHR2UUZXbWM/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-RA3FRAGW1f3LDlxmiulJZQ"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    </ol>
    <div class="bfp-related">
      <span class="bfp-related-label">Repositories &amp; tools</span>
      <div class="bfp-links">
        <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://www.proteomexchange.org/"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right" aria-hidden="true"></i>ProteomeXchange</a>
        <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://www.ebi.ac.uk/pride"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right" aria-hidden="true"></i>PRIDE</a>
        <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="https://github.com/PRIDE-Toolsuite/pride-inspector"><i class="bi bi-github" aria-hidden="true"></i>PRIDE Inspector</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ── Module 4 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <section class="bfp-module">
    <header class="bfp-module-head">
      <span class="bfp-module-num">4</span>
      <div class="bfp-module-heading">
        <span class="bfp-eyebrow">Module</span>
        <h2 class="bfp-module-title">Quantification</h2>
        <p class="bfp-module-desc">Estimating protein abundance across several orders of magnitude, covering the main quantification strategies and their trade-offs.</p>
      </div>
    </header>
    <ol class="bfp-steps">
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">4.0</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Introduction</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRyRkw3dzRaRWkzSGc/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-LuG7ussiMG8NsPcwJfY-xw"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">4.1</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Spectrum counting</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRyYXJLTDZxd3IyTTA/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-m-E3assyzNcxDq6J2BO5Dw"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
            <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://compomics.github.io/projects/peptide-shaker.html"><i class="bi bi-wrench-adjustable" aria-hidden="true"></i>PeptideShaker</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">4.2</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Reporter ions</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4sW8rLWPbRyZ3RBZHBpcm5jWnc/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-SfjWCN2oh3tlKauVAh-Hgg"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ld991SYLJJZisOdQEaSCsTtop-_oKywO/view?usp=sharing"><i class="bi bi-download" aria-hidden="true"></i>Exercise data</a>
            <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://compomics.github.io/projects/searchgui.html"><i class="bi bi-wrench-adjustable" aria-hidden="true"></i>SearchGUI</a>
            <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://compomics.github.io/projects/peptide-shaker.html"><i class="bi bi-wrench-adjustable" aria-hidden="true"></i>PeptideShaker</a>
            <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://compomics.github.io/projects/reporter.html"><i class="bi bi-wrench-adjustable" aria-hidden="true"></i>Reporter</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
      <li class="bfp-step">
        <span class="bfp-step-num">4.5</span>
        <div class="bfp-step-body">
          <h3 class="bfp-step-title">Statistical analysis</h3>
          <div class="bfp-links">
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B4hBxjyTLNhiM0xaR3Q2MklHdUk/view?usp=sharing&resourcekey=0-2Xj8wosJgwTAojqsPIhLIg"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-slides" aria-hidden="true"></i>Course notes</a>
            <a class="bfp-link" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1KUTY4mMVd74YrNrpIjlf8kAYr8crTTzu/view?usp=sharing"><i class="bi bi-download" aria-hidden="true"></i>Exercise data</a>
            <a class="bfp-link bfp-link--tool" href="http://coxdocs.org/doku.php?id=perseus:start"><i class="bi bi-wrench-adjustable" aria-hidden="true"></i>Perseus</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </li>
    </ol>
  </section>

</div>
```
